actions.name: create_contact
actions.risk: creates a new Chatwoot contact record; low risk, no customer notification

actions.name: update_contact
actions.risk: updates an existing Chatwoot contact's profile fields; low risk, no customer notification

actions.name: create_conversation
actions.risk: creates a new conversation in the target inbox; customer-visible once the initial message is delivered through a live channel

actions.name: send_message
actions.risk: sends a message into a conversation; customer-visible unless private is true and may notify the contact through the inbox channel

actions.name: toggle_conversation_status
actions.risk: changes a conversation's status (open/resolved/pending/snoozed); may affect agent routing and reporting metrics

actions.name: create_label
actions.risk: creates a new account-wide label; low risk, visible to all agents in the sidebar when show_on_sidebar is true

actions.name: update_account
actions.risk: high: admin_reverse_etl Chatwoot operation; reverse ETL approval required

actions.name: merge_contact
actions.risk: critical: destructive_action Chatwoot operation; reverse ETL approval required
